/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_mjpeg_server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_mjpeg_server.dir/test_mjpeg_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mjpeg_server.dir/__/src/util/mjpeg_server.cpp.o -o test_mjpeg_server  ../lib/libgtest_main.a -lturbojpeg /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so ../lib/libgtest.a
